title: Fix rak4631 bridge overlay duplicate lora label
description: Why: building firmware/bridge-zephyr for board rak4631/nrf52840 now gets past the SX1262 TCXO binding check, but devicetree generation fails because both the upstream rak4631 board DTS and firmware/bridge-zephyr/boards/rak4631_nrf52840.overlay define label lora. What: reconcile the bridge overlay with the board DTS so the real rak4631/nrf52840 bridge build configures cleanly without duplicate labels.
close_reason: Fixed RAK4631 bridge overlay duplicate labels by reusing upstream board DTS lora and green_led nodes; verified full rak4631/nrf52840 bridge build
